team_name: SmartTender AI — Intelligent Tender Evaluation & Eligibility Analysis Platform for Government Procurement
summary: Design an end-to-end intelligent platform that automates tender evaluation, handles real-world document chaos, provides explainable audit trails, and reduces evaluation time. The system uses AI to extract clean structured text, build a Criteria Registry, retrieve relevant values from bidder documents, and ensure legal defensibility.
optimization_claims: Reducing evaluation time to a same-day process
